mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards (user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, content, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM boards ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boards
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
